output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back Fast
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? Send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com with no signup needed.
content_outline: Why Landlords Withhold Security Deposits (And Why Most Are Wrong)
What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct by Law
Tenant Rights: Return Timelines and Itemized Deduction Rules
Can a Landlord Keep Your Deposit? Breaking Down the Legal Limits
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Gets Results
Get Your Deposit Back in 60 Seconds—No Signup, No Subscription
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days and provide an itemized list of any deductions
Normal wear and tear cannot be legally deducted, yet many landlords wrongfully withhold deposits hoping tenants won't fight back
A formal letter of demand is the fastest, most effective first step to recover your money without immediately hiring a lawyer
output.cta: Stop waiting and start fighting back. Create your deposit return letter of demand at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated tenants and renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return their security deposit
